flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at Delaware County Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (7.1k vs 9.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Delaware County Community College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (8.7k → 6.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Delaware County Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.1k → $6.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Delaware County Community College rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 ($8.7k → $9.7k).
